description: This Kotlin source file defines the TokenRefreshAuthenticator class, an OkHttp Authenticator implementation that handles token refresh logic upon receiving HTTP 401 responses, including mechanisms to prevent infinite refresh loops.

classes.name: TokenRefreshAuthenticator
classes.description: An OkHttp Authenticator that manages token refresh on receiving HTTP 401 responses, with logic to avoid infinite refresh loops and concurrent refresh management.

methods.name: authenticate
methods.description: Handles the authentication process by attempting to refresh tokens upon receiving a 401 response, avoiding repeated attempts or loops.

methods.name: responseCount
methods.description: Counts the number of responses in the chain to prevent infinite retries.
